++++ configure	2006/12/13 01:36:59
+@@ -2257,13 +2257,13 @@

  	 for ac_exec_ext in '' $ac_executable_extensions; do
- 	   { test -f "$as_dir/$ac_prog$ac_exec_ext" && $as_executable_p "$as_dir/$ac_prog$ac_exec_ext"; } || continue
